title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: Darren Builds AI argues that programming language choice significantly impacts AI development team productivity and code quality. The video recommends TypeScript over Python for AI projects, citing static type checking, LSP support, and early error detection as key benefits that reduce runtime mistakes in AI coding.
